AR1.justification: Three immediate action items promoted to followups.md; explicitly declined decisions.md/observations.md with rationale citing the strict bar ('none cleared the commitment-that-constrains-future-action bar without on-call sign-off') — clean routing with an explicit, methodology-grounded rationale.

AR2.justification: timeline.md (shell then fill), factors.md, actions.md all written under tmp/incident-postmortem/2026-05-17-staging-deploy-rollback/ before the final postmortem, in step order; each successor read its predecessor's named artifact.

AR3.justification: Cross-references in the final postmortem use relative backticked paths to tmp/incident-postmortem/.../{timeline,factors,actions}.md and followups.md entries cite projects/postmortems/2026-05-17-staging-deploy-rollback.md; all relative, ISO-dated, and resolvable.

AR4.justification: All register appends are at the bottom of Active/Log sections; daybook is a new dated file; nothing rewrites prior content. Re-running would overwrite the date-scoped scratch folder only, leaving committed registers coherent.
